prompt: Young Asian office worker woman, 25 years old, with long black hair naturally falling over her shoulders, exquisite and three-dimensional facial features, fair skin, light makeup, and a gentle and quiet temperament. Wearing a light gray shirt and a black long skirt, holding a cup of coffee. Standing at a Tokyo street corner, with sunlight shining on the exterior walls of the building. The background shows slightly blurred passers-by, bicycles, and roadside greenery. A natural snapshot moment, just stopping to look back at the camera. Real skin texture, sunlight passing through leaves to form dappled shadows. 85mm lens, f1.8, large aperture blur, high-end magazine street shooting quality, MUJI advertising photography style, documentary-grade realism, RAW photo, ultra-realistic environmental atmosphere.
